jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Bikanervala
jsonLd.description:
Bikanervala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bikanervala:
Bikanervala is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala!
